title: Net force on a charge in a row
prompt: Three charges lie on the x axis: a +6.0 microcoulomb charge at the origin, a +3.0 microcoulomb charge at x = 0.20 m, and a +2.0 microcoulomb charge at x = 0.50 m. Find the magnitude of the net electric force on the +3.0 microcoulomb charge. Use k = 8.99e9 N m^2/C^2.
